description: Migration: marketing_campaigns table (tenant-scoped, RLS, additive)
Migration: marketing_content table with channel variants (jsonb)
Migration: marketing_channels table (platform label + handle/URL; no credential columns)
Migration: social_posts table (content ref, campaign ref, status, scheduled_at)
Migration: social_post_targets table (post × channel: permalink, published_at, published_by)
Migration: marketing_sequences + marketing_sequence_steps tables (step order, delay, template)
Migration: marketing_sequence_enrollments table (contact, sequence, current step, state, next_send_at)
Migration: marketing_contact_state table (contact ref, consent, source, unsubscribed_at)
Migration: marketing_suppressions table (email/contact, reason, source)
Migration: marketing_engagements join table (interaction_id ↔ campaign/content/post/sequence-step)
Migration: seed marketing interaction types (post_published, email_sent, email_opened, email_clicked, form_submitted)
Migration: seed marketing:read + marketing:manage permissions and assign to standard roles
marketing_module feature flag gates nav section and every marketing surface/endpoint
Campaign CRUD server actions + API endpoints
Campaigns list UI
Campaign detail UI with funnel summary (sent → opened → clicked → captured → suggested → accepted)
Campaign status lifecycle (draft/active/completed/archived)
Content piece CRUD with per-channel variants
Content library UI (list/create/edit)
Markdown rendering + preview for content pieces
Channel CRUD (named destination; platform label + handle/URL only)
Channels management UI
Create post from content piece targeting one or more channels with scheduled time
Per-target state machine: draft → scheduled → awaiting-manual-publish → published / expired
Scheduled job flips due targets to awaiting-manual-publish (idempotent on re-run)
Mark-published action with optional permalink and published_by (user or API token)
Skip action + grace-period job auto-expires stale awaiting-manual-publish targets
Posts queue UI with filters (state, channel, date range)
Rendered per-channel post text with copy-to-clipboard in queue UI

Calendar surface (Concept B, ux/calendar.html): agenda-forward — Today card with inline copy/mark-published, day groups for upcoming posts, published-this-week log, 'Needs publishing' rail; month grid as secondary toggle
API endpoint: list due/awaiting-manual-publish posts (agent-oriented)
API endpoint: get rendered post content per channel target
API endpoint: mark target published (permalink) or skipped/expired
Publish-loop endpoints registered in API registry with agent-discoverable descriptions
Publish-loop endpoints enforce marketing permissions (MCP callers ACL-scoped)
Capture form definition CRUD (e.g. newsletter, demo-request) with embeddable URL
Public unauthenticated capture endpoint: validated, rate-limited, suppression list not enumerable
Capture creates/updates marketing contact linked to contacts (no contacts table changes)
Capture records form_submitted interaction with campaign/source attribution
Forms management UI (definitions + URLs)
Register inbound-lead generator (generator_key: 'inbound-lead') with opportunity_suggestions
Capture events produce opportunity_suggestions carrying attribution in generator_context
Accepting an inbound-lead suggestion creates opportunity with source attribution intact (existing Opportunities UI)
Suggestion payload references campaign/content/form for downstream reporting
Sequence CRUD: ordered steps with delay + markdown template
Manual enrollment add/remove per contact
Enrollment state machine (active/completed/stopped) with next_send_at tracking
Scheduled send job: due steps sent via outbound email abstraction (idempotent; no double-sends)
Unsubscribe link injected into every sequence email
Unsubscribe endpoint: immediate suppression + stops all active enrollments for that address
Suppression list checked by every send (hard guard, including re-imported contacts)
Sequences UI (Concept B, ux/sequences.html): horizontal journey cards with delay-arrow connectors and per-step stats; enrollment table with per-contact progress bars; sending-config side tile
Merge fields in sequence templates (contact name, company, etc.)
Post published → post_published interaction recorded + linked via marketing_engagements
Sequence email sent → email_sent interaction recorded + linked
PostHog tracking pixel for email opens
PostHog redirect-link tracking for email clicks
Open/click events recorded as email_opened/email_clicked interactions
Marketing engagements visible on contact timeline
Marketing engagements visible on opportunity timeline after suggestion accept
Marketing state (consent, source, unsubscribed) visible on contact record
Docs: automation recipe — Claude Desktop + @alga-psa/mcp-connector config and publish-loop prompt playbook

User Activities integration: fetchMarketingActivities aggregation source maps awaiting-manual-publish targets to generic activities (title, due date, overdue→HIGH priority, link to posts queue); visible to marketing:manage holders; returns nothing when flag off (pattern: fetchOpportunityActivities)
